evals.prompt: I need a hero image for a blog post about AI agents in production. The post is about monitoring, reliability, and circuit breakers for AI systems. Dark tech aesthetic to match the site.
evals.expected_output: A detailed image prompt with cinematic direction, site color references, anti-stock-photo techniques, and paired alt text.

assertions.text: Prompt includes site brand colors as hex codes (e.g., #f59e0b amber, #8b5cf6 violet)
No CSS notation in prompt (no rgba(), box-shadow, px, opacity percentages)
No stock-photo poses (no arms crossed, no looking at camera smiling, no handshake)
Lighting described in photographic terms (not 'glowing orbs' or 'radial gradient')
Includes specific composition direction (camera angle, depth of field)
Includes photography style closing (e.g., 'documentary style', 'editorial portrait')
Alt text is included, under 125 chars, does not start with 'Image of'
Specifies 16:9 aspect ratio for blog hero

evals.prompt: Write prompts for 3 hero images: one for our AI offerings page, one for the web development page, and one for client stories. These need to feel like a cohesive set.
evals.expected_output: Three distinct prompts with pose variety, consistent brand colors, and CSV output format.

assertions.text: Output is in CSV format with page_path, placement, prompt, alt_text columns
Three distinct prompts with different poses/compositions (not repeated setups)
Camera angles vary across the set (not all the same angle)
All three use consistent brand color palette
Each prompt has paired alt text under 125 chars
At least one 'imperfect detail' per prompt (pushed-up sleeves, coffee cup, etc.)

evals.prompt: I want a hero image showing someone using our command center dashboard. They should be at a desk with the dashboard on screen. Make it feel real, not stock-photo-ish.
evals.expected_output: A prompt with explicit screen content description, natural device interaction, and candid pose.

assertions.text: Screen content described spatially ('navigation bar across the top', 'cards below', etc.) not abstractly ('a dashboard')
Person is mid-action (typing, looking at screen absorbed) not posed
Device interaction is natural (hands on keyboard, or leaning back reading)
Includes at least one imperfect/authentic detail
Three-point lighting or equivalent photographic direction included
